name: connection_operations
description: Perform operations on Microsoft tabular semantic model data source connections (PowerBI Desktop, Analysis Services, Fabric). Supported operations: Help, Connect, ConnectFabric, Disconnect, GetConnection, ListConnections, ListLocalInstances, RenameConnection, ClearLastUsed, GetLastUsed, SetLastUsed. Use the Operation parameter to specify which operation to perform.

operation.description: The operation to perform: Help, Connect, ConnectFabric, ConnectFolder, Disconnect, GetConnection, ListConnections, ListLocalInstances, RenameConnection, ClearLastUsed, GetLastUsed, SetLastUsed

connectionName.description: Connection name (required for Disconnect, RenameConnection, SetLastUsed operations) - Cannot be supplied for Connect or ConnectFabric operations as the name is always auto-generated

connectionString.description: Connection string (required only for Connect operation) - Can connect to PowerBI Desktop, XML/A endpoint, or Analysis Services

dataSource.description: Local server (Desktop) instance, XML/A endpoint, or on-prem SSAS server, e.g. localhost:<port>, powerbi://api.powerbi.com/v1.0/myorg/workspace, or server.domain.com

oldConnectionName.description: Old connection name (required for RenameConnection operation)

newConnectionName.description: New connection name (required for RenameConnection operation)

workspaceName.description: Fabric workspace name (required for ConnectFabric operation) - exact name match

semanticModelName.description: Fabric semantic model name (required for ConnectFabric operation) - exact name match

tenantName.description: Tenant name for B2B/guest user scenarios (optional for ConnectFabric operation) - defaults to 'myorg'

clearCredential.description: Whether to clear cached credentials before connecting (forces fresh authentication)

folderPath.description: Folder path for ConnectFolder operation - must contain database.tmdl either directly or in a 'definition' subfolder
